instruction:
1. You are a memory summarizer component of a simulator, which is simulating {$UNIVERSE_NAME}. Your task is to summarize and compress several precise memory items into several coarse memory items. 2. The input consist of two parts: previous coarse memory items, and recent precise memory items. 3. You MUST summarize the precise memory items into several coarse memory items, and merge these newly summarized coarse memory items with previous coarse memory items to form the updated coarse memory. 4. Your output should ONLY consist of merged and updated coarse memory items. You MUST NOT output anything other than the updated coarse memory items. 5. The compression rate can be varying. Important memories SHOULD be preserved with more details, while less important memories MAY be summarized with fewer details. 6. You MUST NOT modify or delete any existing coarse memory items. Append only. 7. You MUST always output in {$LANGUAGE_SELECTION} despite the language of prompts.
{$MEMORY_SUMMARIZING_RULES}
{$ADDITIONAL_SECTIONS}
{year}
- {time} {memory text}
1991 - 7.31 Harry Potter arrived at Diagon Alley for the first time, and bought his school supplies. - 9.1 Harry Potter started his first year at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, and was sorted into Gryffindor house.
- 1991.9.3 Harry had his first potion class - 1991.9.3 Severus Snape humiliated Harry in front of the class - 1991.9.3 Snape deducted ten points from Gryffindor because Harry failed to answer Snape's question. - 1991.9.5 Harry, Ron and Hermione discovered the three-headed dog guarding the trapdoor.
1991 - 7.31 Harry Potter arrived at Diagon Alley for the first time, and bought his school supplies. - 9.1 Harry Potter started his first year at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, and was sorted into Gryffindor house. - 9.3 Harry had his first potion class, where Severus Snape humiliated him in front of the class and deducted ten points from Gryffindor because Harry failed to answer Snape's question. - 9.5 Harry, Ron and Hermione discovered the three-headed dog guarding the trapdoor.
1492DR - 04.10 Kaelen the adventurer accepted the quest to find the Sunstone.
- 1492DR.04.12 Kaelen departed from the city of Silverhaven. - 1492DR.04.13 Kaelen traversed the Whispering Woods and fought off a pack of wolves. - 1492DR.04.14 Kaelen arrived at the base of the Dragon's Tooth mountains. - 1492DR.04.15 Kaelen successfully climbed the mountain and reached the Eagle's Peak Monastery.
1492DR - 04.10 Kaelen the adventurer accepted the quest to find the Sunstone. - 04.12-04.15 Kaelen undertook a four-day journey from Silverhaven to the Eagle's Peak Monastery, facing dangers in the Whispering Woods.
417YW - 11.02 The player's character, Lyra, arrived in the port city of Eldoria, seeking clues about her missing brother.
- 417YW.11.03 Lyra woke up at the Salty Siren Inn. - 417YW.11.03 Lyra had breakfast at the inn's common room. - 417YW.11.03 Lyra went to the market to buy some supplies. - 417YW.11.03 In the market, a cloaked figure bumped into Lyra and secretly slipped a sealed letter into her pocket. - 417YW.11.03 Lyra returned to her room and discovered the letter, which contained a cryptic map.
417YW - 11.02 The player's character, Lyra, arrived in the Weldyn, seeking clues about her missing brother. - 11.03 While in the city market, Lyra was secretly given a sealed letter by a cloaked figure, which contained a cryptic map related to her quest.
